policy.note: This guard validates the owner review session brief. It does not record answers or apply decisions.

findings.message: Session brief must be ready.
Session brief must not record decisions.
Session brief must not write session files.
Session brief must not apply decisions.
Session brief must not write public files.
Session brief must not write public manifests.
Session brief must keep public-ready after brief at 0.
Session brief must reference a ready owner review packet.
Session brief must reference a passing packet guard.
Session brief must keep router guarded review-only or private-diagnostic ready.
Session brief must contain six owner questions.
Session brief must classify five prior owner signals.
No prior signal may be recordable now.
All six owner answers must remain required.
Session brief must not write actionable decisions.
Session brief summary must keep public-ready at 0.
Prior owner signals array must contain five items.
Prior signal pilot_reference_scope must not be recordable now.
Prior signal pilot_reference_scope must include a reason.
Prior signal sample_depth must not be recordable now.
Prior signal sample_depth must include a reason.
Prior signal local_first_onedrive_books_eth_hslu must not be recordable now.
Prior signal local_first_onedrive_books_eth_hslu must include a reason.
Prior signal same_day_nightshift must not be recordable now.
Prior signal same_day_nightshift must include a reason.
Prior signal autonomous_private_github_push must not be recordable now.
Prior signal autonomous_private_github_push must include a reason.
Session question count must match owner question brief.
Session question source-root must exist in owner question brief.
Session question source-root must remain unanswered.
Session question source-root safe default must match source.
Session question source-root allowed answers must match source.
Session question batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates must exist in owner question brief.
Session question batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates must remain unanswered.
Session question batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates safe default must match source.
Session question batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates allowed answers must match source.
Session question batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files must exist in owner question brief.
Session question batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files must remain unanswered.
Session question batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files safe default must match source.
Session question batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files allowed answers must match source.
Session question batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation must exist in owner question brief.
Session question batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation must remain unanswered.
Session question batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation safe default must match source.
Session question batch-c-model-promotion-confirmation allowed answers must match source.
Session question batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap must exist in owner question brief.
Session question batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap must remain unanswered.
Session question batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap safe default must match source.
Session question batch-d-sogn-benedetg-source-gap allowed answers must match source.
Session question batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews must exist in owner question brief.
Session question batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews must remain unanswered.
Session question batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews safe default must match source.
Session question batch-e-kosmoasset-human-reviews allowed answers must match source.
Source-root decision must remain pending or recorded metadata-only.
Source-root path must remain pending or recorded metadata-only.
Source-root safe default must remain keep_blocked or metadata-only after recorded root.

next_actions: Fix owner review session brief guard failures before presenting it.
Rerun npm run kosmo:owner-review-session-brief and npm run kosmo:owner-review-session-brief-check.
